calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Sylvia Husing; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:37 pm and concluding at 1:39 pm

Plaintiff Paul Puey is represented by Jeffrey Chen, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Eric Martindale is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Paul Puey, and against Defendant Eric Martindale, as follows:

1. Damages: $46,530.00

Costs and Attorney fees waived.

Total $46,530.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Continued To Sep-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
